Headline: Subway trains rerouted to elevated tracks
ShortDescription: Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line subway trains will be rerouted to the elevated tracks between Cermak-Chinatown and Fullerton in both directions to allow for subway maintenance.

Trains will not stop at subway stations (see map below).

For fastest travel times, walk to the nearest ‘L’ station served by rerouted trains or use the free bus shuttle service offered between Fullerton and Clark/Lake in both directions.

Allow extra travel time.

*Entry/exit at Merchandise Mart station is via the Kinzie auxiliary entrance stairways, and requires a farecard (no vending machines), during hours when the building is closed. To make step-free transfers to Red Line trains during this time, consider shuttle buses to connect with Clark/Lake or Fullerton.

Headline: #74 Fullerton Temporary Reroute near Fullerton/Central
ShortDescription: 74 Fullerton buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#74 Fullerton buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

#74 Fullerton buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions buses will operate via Grand, Armitage, Cicero, and Fullerton over to normal route due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #85 Central Temporary Reroute at Fullerton/Central
ShortDescription: 85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

#85 Central buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions buses will operate via Central, Belmont, Narragansett, Grand and Central over to normal route due to street blockage near Fullerton/Central.

Allow extra travel time.
